Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************

 Limits in the Eilenberg-Moore category

 Contents
 1. Terminal objects
 2. Binary products
 3. Pullbacks
 4. Initial objects
 5. Binary coproducts

 ******************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.EilenbergMoore.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Subcategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Subcategory.Full.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section EilenbergMooreCategoryLimits.
  Context {C : category}
          (m : Monad C).

  (**
   1. Terminal objects
   *)
  
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
eilenberg_moore_cat m

  
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
eilenberg_moore_cat m

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
C
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
C ⟦ m ?x, ?x ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
η m ?x · ?f = identity ?x
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
μ m ?x · ?f = # m ?f · ?f

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
C
 exact T.
    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
C ⟦ m T, T ⟧
 apply (TerminalArrow (_ ,, HT)).
    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
η m T · TerminalArrow (T,, HT) (m T) = identity T
 apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (_ ,, HT)).
    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: C
HT: isTerminal C T
μ m T · TerminalArrow (T,, HT) (m T) =
# m (TerminalArrow (T,, HT) (m T))
· TerminalArrow (T,, HT) (m T)
 apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (_ ,, HT)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
isTerminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m) T

  
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
isTerminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m) T

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
iscontr (eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, T ⟧)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, T ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
∏ t : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, T ⟧, t = ?x

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, T ⟧
 
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ pr11 x, pr11 T ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 x · ?f = # m ?f · pr21 T

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ pr11 x, pr11 T ⟧
 apply (TerminalArrow (_ ,, HT)).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 x · TerminalArrow (pr11 T,, HT) (pr11 x) =
# m (TerminalArrow (pr11 T,, HT) (pr11 x)) · pr21 T
 apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (_ ,, HT)).
    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HT: isTerminal C (pr11 T)
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
∏ t : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, T ⟧,
t =
make_mor_eilenberg_moore m
  (TerminalArrow (pr11 T,, HT) (pr11 x))
  (TerminalArrowEq
     (pr21 x · TerminalArrow (pr11 T,, HT) (pr11 x))
     (# m (TerminalArrow (pr11 T,, HT) (pr11 x))
      · pr21 T))
 abstract
        (intro f ;
         use eq_mor_eilenberg_moore ;
         apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (_ ,, HT))).
  Defined.

  Section Terminal.
    Context (T : Terminal C).

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
Terminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
Terminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
eilenberg_moore_cat m
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
isTerminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m) ?b

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
eilenberg_moore_cat m
 exact (terminal_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat (pr1 T) (pr2 T)).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
isTerminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
  (terminal_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat (pr1 T) (pr2 T))
 
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
isTerminal C
  (pr11 (terminal_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat (pr1 T)
           (pr2 T)))

        exact (pr2 T).
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
preserves_terminal (eilenberg_moore_pr m)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
preserves_terminal (eilenberg_moore_pr m)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
Terminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
preserves_chosen_terminal ?HC₁ (eilenberg_moore_pr m)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
Terminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
 exact terminal_eilenberg_moore_cat.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
preserves_chosen_terminal terminal_eilenberg_moore_cat
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
 
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
isTerminal C
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m terminal_eilenberg_moore_cat)

        apply T.
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_terminal F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_terminal
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_terminal F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_terminal
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_terminal F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isTerminal C' x
isTerminal (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_terminal F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isTerminal C' x
isTerminal C
  (pr11 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x))

      
C: category
m: Monad C
T: Terminal C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_terminal F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isTerminal C' x
isTerminal C' x

      exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End Terminal.

  (**
   2. Binary products
   *)
  Section IsBinaryProduct.
    Context {x y p : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
            (π₁ : p --> x)
            (π₂ : p --> y)
            (H : isBinProduct C _ _ _ (pr11 π₁) (pr11 π₂)).

    Let P : BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y) := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
   k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
   k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
   k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
φ₁ = φ₂

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = f × x0 · π₂ = g)
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = f × x0 · π₂ = g)

        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
x0: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧
isaprop (x0 · π₁ = f × x0 · π₂ = g)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr111 φ₁ = pr111 φ₂

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr111 φ₁ · BinProductPr1 C P =
pr111 φ₂ · BinProductPr1 C P
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr111 φ₁ · BinProductPr2 C P =
pr111 φ₂ · BinProductPr2 C P

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr111 φ₁ · BinProductPr1 C P =
pr111 φ₂ · BinProductPr1 C P
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₁) @ !(maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₂))).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g
pr111 φ₁ · BinProductPr2 C P =
pr111 φ₂ · BinProductPr2 C P
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr22 φ₁) @ !(maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr22 φ₂))).
    Qed.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧

eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, p ⟧

g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
pr21 w · ?f = # m ?f · pr21 p

      
C: category

π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧

  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ pr11 w, pr11 p ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)).

C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧

w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
pr21 w · BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
· BinProductPr1 C P =
# m (BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr21 p
· BinProductPr1 C P
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧

  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
pr21 w · BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
· BinProductPr2 C P =
# m (BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr21 p
· BinProductPr2 C P

        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
pr21 w · BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
· BinProductPr1 C P =
# m (BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr21 p
· BinProductPr1 C P
 abstract
            (rewrite !assoc' ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P)
             | ] ;
             refine (eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f @ !_) ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               exact (pr21 π₁)
             | ] ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite <- functor_comp ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P)).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, p: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
pr21 w · BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
· BinProductPr2 C P =
# m (BinProductArrow C P (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr21 p
· BinProductPr2 C P
 abstract
            (rewrite !assoc' ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P)
             | ] ;
             refine (eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor g @ !_) ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               exact (pr21 π₂)
             | ] ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite <- functor_comp ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P)).
    Defined.

  (pr11 π₂)
P:= make_BinProduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 p) (pr11 π₁)
  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
isBinProduct_eilenberg_moore_cat_mor f g · π₁ = f

pr11 (isBinProduct_eilenberg_moore_cat_mor f g · π₁) =
pr11 f

      apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P).
    Qed.

  (pr11 π₂) H: BinProduct C (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
∏ (c : eilenberg_moore_cat m)
(f : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(g : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ c, y ⟧),
∃! k : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ c, p ⟧,
k · π₁ = f × k · π₂ = g

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : isBinProduct_eilenberg_moore_cat_mor f g · π₁ =
       f,
 isBinProduct_eilenberg_moore_cat_mor f g · π₂ = g)
  (isBinProduct_eilenberg_moore_cat_pr1 f g)
 exact (isBinProduct_eilenberg_moore_cat_pr2 f g).
    Defined.
  End IsBinaryProduct.

  Section BinaryProducts.
    Context (P : BinProducts C).

    Definition BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob
               (x y : eilenberg_moore_cat m)
      : C
      := pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)).

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob x y),
BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob x y ⟧

m: Monad C

pr11 x ⟧

pr11 y ⟧

m: Monad C

x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob x y),
pr11 x ⟧
 exact (# m (BinProductPr1 _ _) · pr21 x).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob x y),
pr11 y ⟧
 exact (# m (BinProductPr2 _ _) · pr21 y).
    Defined.

η m (BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob x y)
· BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_mor x y =
identity
  (functor_identity C
     (BinProduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat_ob x y))

· (# m (pr21 x) · pr21 x)

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
isBinProduct C (eilenberg_moore_pr m x)
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m y)
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m
     (BinProducts_eilenberg_moore_cat x y))
  (# (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
     (BinProductPr1 (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
        (BinProducts_eilenberg_moore_cat x y)))
  (# (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
     (BinProductPr2 (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
        (BinProducts_eilenberg_moore_cat x y)))

        apply P.
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_binproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_binproduct
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_binproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_binproduct
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_binproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinProduct (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ y)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ p)
  (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₁)
  (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_binproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x))
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ y))
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ p))
  (pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
           π₁))
  (pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
           π₂))

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinProducts C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_binproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C' x y p π₁ π₂

      exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End BinaryProducts.

  (**
   3. Pullbacks
   *)
  Section IsPullback.
    Context {x y z : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
            {f : x --> z}
            {g : y --> z}
            {pb : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
            {π₁ : pb --> x}
            {π₂ : pb --> y}
            (q : π₁ · f = π₂ · g)
            (q' : pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g)
            (H : @isPullback
                   C
                   (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 pb)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
                   (pr11 π₁) (pr11 π₂)
                   q').

    Section UMP.
      Context {w : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
              (h : w --> x)
              (k : w --> y)
              (r : h · f = k · g).

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k)

        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k)

        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k
φ₁ = φ₂

        
C: category

π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧

k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧

  (λ x0 : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = h × x0 · π₂ = k)

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k
pr111 φ₁ · pr11 π₁ = pr111 φ₂ · pr11 π₁
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂))).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m

k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧

hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k
pr111 φ₁ · pr11 π₂ = pr111 φ₂ · pr11 π₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂))).
      Qed.

m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
C ⟦ pr11 w, pr11 y ⟧
 exact (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k).
          
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h · pr11 f =
mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k · pr11 g
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) r).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
pr21 w
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑
              x : dialgebra m (functor_identity C)
                  ⟦ w, z ⟧,
              sub_precategory_predicate_morphisms
                (full_sub_precategory
                   (eilenberg_moore_cat_pred m)) w z x,
        pr11 z) r) =
# m
  (PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
     (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
     (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑
               x : dialgebra m (functor_identity C)
                   ⟦ w, z ⟧,
               sub_precategory_predicate_morphisms
                 (full_sub_precategory
                    (eilenberg_moore_cat_pred m)) w z
                 x, pr11 z) r)) · pr21 pb

k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
pr21 w
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)

C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
pr21 w
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑
              x : dialgebra m (functor_identity C)
                  ⟦ w, z ⟧,
              sub_precategory_predicate_morphisms
                (full_sub_precategory
                   (eilenberg_moore_cat_pred m)) w z x,
        pr11 z) r) · pr11 π₁ =
# m
  (PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
     (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
     (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑
               x : dialgebra m (functor_identity C)
                   ⟦ w, z ⟧,
               sub_precategory_predicate_morphisms
                 (full_sub_precategory
                    (eilenberg_moore_cat_pred m)) w z
                 x, pr11 z) r)) · pr21 pb · pr11 π₁
 abstract
              (rewrite !assoc' ;
               etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths ;
                   apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback _ H))
                 | ] ;
               refine (!_) ;
               etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths ;
                   exact (pr21 π₁)
                 | ] ;
               rewrite !assoc ;
               rewrite <- functor_comp ;
               etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
                   apply maponpaths ;
                   apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback _ H))
                 | ] ;
               exact (!(eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h))).
          
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
pr21 w
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
    (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑
              x : dialgebra m (functor_identity C)
                  ⟦ w, z ⟧,
              sub_precategory_predicate_morphisms
                (full_sub_precategory
                   (eilenberg_moore_cat_pred m)) w z x,
        pr11 z) r) · pr11 π₂ =
# m
  (PullbackArrow (make_Pullback q' H) (pr11 w)
     (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor h)
     (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑
               x : dialgebra m (functor_identity C)
                   ⟦ w, z ⟧,
               sub_precategory_predicate_morphisms
                 (full_sub_precategory
                    (eilenberg_moore_cat_pred m)) w z
                 x, pr11 z) r)) · pr21 pb · pr11 π₂
 abstract
              (rewrite !assoc' ;
               etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths ;
                   apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback _ H))
                 | ] ;
               refine (!_) ;
               etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths ;
                   exact (pr21 π₂)
                 | ] ;
               rewrite !assoc ;
               rewrite <- functor_comp ;
               etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
                   apply maponpaths ;
                   apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback _ H))
                 | ] ;
               exact (!(eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor k))).
      Defined.
    End UMP.

m: Monad C

π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧

isPullback q

g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧

q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g

hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k

r: h · f = k · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k)

r: h · f = k · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h × hk · π₂ = k)
 exact (isPullback_eilenberg_moore_unique h k).

m: Monad C

π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, pb ⟧
 exact (isPullback_eilenberg_moore_mor h k r).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
isPullback_eilenberg_moore_mor h k r · π₁ = h
 abstract
            (use eq_mor_eilenberg_moore ;
             apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback _ H))).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb: eilenberg_moore_cat m
π₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
q': pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H: isPullback q'
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
h: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, x ⟧
k: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ w, y ⟧
r: h · f = k · g
(λ _ : isPullback_eilenberg_moore_mor h k r · π₁ = h,
 isPullback_eilenberg_moore_mor h k r · π₂ = k)
  (isPullback_eilenberg_moore_subproof w h k r)
 abstract
            (use eq_mor_eilenberg_moore ;
             apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback _ H))).
    Defined.
  End IsPullback.

  Section Pullbacks.
    Context (PB : Pullbacks C).

    Section PullbackCone.
      Context {x y z : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
              (f : x --> z)
              (g : y --> z).

      Definition ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
        : C
        := PB _ _ _ (pr11 f) (pr11 g).

      
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob,
ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob ⟧

m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob,
ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob ⟧

        
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob, pr1 x ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob, pr1 y ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
?h · pr11 f = ?k · pr11 g

        
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob, pr1 x ⟧
 exact (# m (PullbackPr1 (PB _ _ _ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))) · pr21 x).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob, pr1 y ⟧
 exact (# m (PullbackPr2 (PB _ _ _ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))) · pr21 y).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
# m
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· pr21 x · pr11 f =
# m
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· pr21 y · pr11 g
 abstract
            (rewrite !assoc' ;
             refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (pr21 f) @ _) ;
             refine (_ @ !(maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (pr21 g))) ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             apply PullbackSqrCommutes).
      Defined.

      
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
η m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
· mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob =
identity
  (functor_identity C
     ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob)

η m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
· PullbackArrow
    (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
    (m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob)
    (# m
       (PullbackPr1
          (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g))) · pr21 x)
    (# m
       (PullbackPr2
          (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g))) · pr21 y)
    mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_subproof
· pr121 (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
identity
  (functor_identity C
     ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob)
· pr121 (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g))

· pr21 y = ?b

  (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
· identity (functor_identity C (pr11 y)) =

           (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g))) · pr21 y)
     mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_subproof)
· # m
    (PullbackPr1
       (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g))) =
# m
  (# m
     (PullbackPr1
        (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
   · pr21 x)

           (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g))) · pr21 y)
     mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_subproof
   · pr221 (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g)))

· (μ m (pr1 y) · pr21 y) = ?b

     (# m

           (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g))) · pr21 x)
     (# m

           (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g))) · pr21 y)
     mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_subproof
   · PullbackPr2

g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
  (m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob)
  (# m
     (PullbackPr1
        (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
   · pr21 x)
  (# m
     (PullbackPr2
        (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
   · pr21 y)
  mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
# m
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· pr21 y

          apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
      Qed.

η m ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
· mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob =
identity ob_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
 exact pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_unit.

· mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob =

· mor_of_pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
 exact pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob_mult.

pr21 pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
· PullbackPr1
    (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
# m
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· pr21 x
 apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
      Defined.

m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob,
y ⟧

C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr21 pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob · ?f =
# m ?f · pr21 y

        
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
C ⟦ pr11 pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob, pr11 y ⟧
 apply PullbackPr2.
        
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr21 pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_ob
· PullbackPr2
    (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
# m
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB (pr1 z) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· pr21 y
 apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
      Defined.

pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_pr2 · g

C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr11 (pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_pr1 · f) =
pr11 (pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_pr2 · g)

        apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
      Qed.
    End PullbackCone.

 exact (pullbacks_eilenberg_moore_eq f g).

        exact (pr22 (PB _ _ _ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))).
    Defined.

  (preserves_chosen_pullback_subproof
     (eilenberg_moore_cat m) C
     Pullbacks_eilenberg_moore (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
     x y z f g)

        apply PB.
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_pullback F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_pullback
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_pullback F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_pullback
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_pullback F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, z, pb: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C' ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₁
· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
    f =
# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₂
· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
    g
Hx: isPullback q
isPullback Fq

      
C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_pullback F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, z, pb: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C' ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₁
· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
    f =
# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₂
· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
    g
Hx: isPullback q
pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
        π₁)
· pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
          f) =
pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
        π₂)
· pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
          g)

x, y, z, pb: C'

g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C' ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

C: category
m: Monad C
PB: Pullbacks C
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_pullback F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, z, pb: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C' ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₁
· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
    f =
# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₂
· # (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
    g
Hx: isPullback q
pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
        π₁)
· pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
          f) =
pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
        π₂)
· pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
          g)
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact q).

    Defined.
  End Pullbacks.

  (**
   4. Initial objects
   *)
  
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
isInitial (eilenberg_moore_cat m) I

  
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
isInitial (eilenberg_moore_cat m) I

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
∏ b : eilenberg_moore_cat m,
iscontr (eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ I, b ⟧)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
iscontr (eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ I, x ⟧)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ I, x ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
∏ t : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ I, x ⟧, t = ?x

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ I, x ⟧
 
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ pr11 I, pr11 x ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 I · ?f = # m ?f · pr21 x

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ pr11 I, pr11 x ⟧
 apply (InitialArrow (make_Initial _ HI)).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 I
· InitialArrow (make_Initial (pr11 I) HI) (pr11 x) =
# m (InitialArrow (make_Initial (pr11 I) HI) (pr11 x))
· pr21 x
 apply (@InitialArrowEq _ (make_Initial _ (Hm _ HI))).
    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: eilenberg_moore_cat m
HI: isInitial C (pr11 I)
Hm: preserves_initial m
x: eilenberg_moore_cat m
∏ t : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ I, x ⟧,
t =
make_mor_eilenberg_moore m
  (InitialArrow (make_Initial (pr11 I) HI) (pr11 x))
  (InitialArrowEq
     (pr21 I
      · InitialArrow (make_Initial (pr11 I) HI)
          (pr11 x))
     (# m
        (InitialArrow (make_Initial (pr11 I) HI)
           (pr11 x)) · pr21 x))
 abstract
        (intro f ;
         use eq_mor_eilenberg_moore ;
         apply (@InitialArrowEq _ (make_Initial _ HI))).
  Defined.

  Section Initial.
    Context (I : Initial C)
            (Hm : preserves_initial m).

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
eilenberg_moore_cat m

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
eilenberg_moore_cat m

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C ⟦ m ?x, ?x ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
η m ?x · ?f = identity ?x
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
μ m ?x · ?f = # m ?f · ?f

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C
 exact I.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C ⟦ m I, I ⟧
 apply (InitialArrow (make_Initial _ (Hm I (pr2 I)))).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
η m I
· InitialArrow (make_Initial (m I) (Hm I (pr2 I))) I =
identity I
 apply InitialArrowEq.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
μ m I
· InitialArrow (make_Initial (m I) (Hm I (pr2 I))) I =
# m
  (InitialArrow (make_Initial (m I) (Hm I (pr2 I))) I)
· InitialArrow (make_Initial (m I) (Hm I (pr2 I))) I
 apply (@InitialArrowEq _ (make_Initial _ (Hm _ (Hm I (pr2 I))))).
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
Initial (eilenberg_moore_cat m)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
Initial (eilenberg_moore_cat m)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
eilenberg_moore_cat m
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
isInitial (eilenberg_moore_cat m) ?a

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
eilenberg_moore_cat m
 exact initial_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
isInitial (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
  initial_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat
 
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
isInitial C (pr11 initial_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat)
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
preserves_initial m

        
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
isInitial C (pr11 initial_obj_eilenberg_moore_cat)
 exact (pr2 I).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
preserves_initial m
 exact Hm.
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
preserves_initial (eilenberg_moore_pr m)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
preserves_initial (eilenberg_moore_pr m)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
Initial (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
preserves_chosen_initial ?HC₁ (eilenberg_moore_pr m)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
Initial (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
 exact initial_eilenberg_moore_cat.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
preserves_chosen_initial initial_eilenberg_moore_cat
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
 apply I.
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_initial
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_initial
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isInitial C' x
isInitial (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isInitial C' x
isInitial C
  (pr11 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x))
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isInitial C' x
preserves_initial m

      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isInitial C' x
isInitial C
  (pr11 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x))
 
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isInitial C' x
isInitial C' x

        exact Hx.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
I: Initial C
Hm: preserves_initial m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_initial F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x: C'
Hx: isInitial C' x
preserves_initial m
 exact Hm.
    Defined.
  End Initial.

  (**
   5. Binary coproducts
   *)
  Section IsBinaryCoproduct.
    Context (Hm : preserves_bincoproduct m)
            {x y sum : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
            (ι₁ : x --> sum)
            (ι₂ : y --> sum)
            (H : isBinCoproduct _ _ _ _ (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)).

    Let copr : BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
      := make_BinCoproduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H.

    Section UMP.
      Context {w : eilenberg_moore_cat m}
              (f : x --> w)
              (g : y --> w).

      
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
   ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
   ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g)

        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
   ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g)

        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
φ₁ = φ₂

        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧

ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
   ι₁ · x0 = f × ι₂ · x0 = g)
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) 
  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) 
  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

  (λ x0 : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,

C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
x0: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧
isaprop (ι₁ · x0 = f × ι₂ · x0 = g)

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn1 copr · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 copr · pr111 φ₂
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂)

  (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧

ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn2 copr · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn2 copr · pr111 φ₂

        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn1 copr · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 copr · pr111 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂))).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn2 copr · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn2 copr · pr111 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂))).
      Qed.

      
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧

      
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧

C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) 
  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) 
  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr21 sum · ?f = # m ?f · pr21 w

        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ pr11 sum, pr11 w ⟧
 exact (BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g)).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)

w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr21 sum · BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g) =
# m (BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
· pr21 w

m: Monad C

w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
# m (pr11 ι₁)
· (pr21 sum · BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =

· (# m (BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr21 w)
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) 
  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) 
  (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) 
  (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
# m (pr11 ι₂)
· (pr21 sum · BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
# m (pr11 ι₂)
· (# m (BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr21 w)

          
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
# m (pr11 ι₁)
· (pr21 sum · BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
# m (pr11 ι₁)
· (# m (BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr21 w)
 abstract
              (rewrite !assoc ;
               rewrite <- functor_comp ;
               etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 exact (!(eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor ι₁))
               | ] ;
               rewrite !assoc' ;
               etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths ;
                 apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ copr)
               | ] ;
               refine (!_) ;
               etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ copr)
               | ] ;
               exact (!(eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f))).
          
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
# m (pr11 ι₂)
· (pr21 sum · BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) =
# m (pr11 ι₂)
· (# m (BinCoproductArrow copr (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr21 w)
 abstract
              (rewrite !assoc ;
               rewrite <- functor_comp ;
               etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 exact (!(eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor ι₂))
               | ] ;
               rewrite !assoc' ;
               etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths ;
                 apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ copr)
               | ] ;
               refine (!_) ;
               etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ copr)
               | ] ;
               exact (!(eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor g))).
      Defined.

m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
ι₁ · isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_mor = f

C: category
m: Monad C

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr11 (ι₁ · isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_mor) =
pr11 f

        apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ copr).
      Qed.

      Qed.
    End UMP.

isBinCoproduct (eilenberg_moore_cat m) x y sum ι₁ ι₂

m: Monad C

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
∃! fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g

      
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)

w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
   ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g)

m: Monad C

x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m

ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧

  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ sum, w ⟧,
   ι₁ · fg = f × ι₂ · fg = g)
 exact (isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_unique f g).

f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
ι₁ · isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_mor f g = f
 exact (isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in1 f g).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y, sum: eilenberg_moore_cat m
ι₁: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, sum ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum)
  (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂)
copr:= make_BinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 sum) (pr11 ι₁) (pr11 ι₂) H: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
w: eilenberg_moore_cat m
f: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat m ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : ι₁ · isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_mor f g = f,
 ι₂ · isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_mor f g = g)
  (isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in1 f g)
 exact (isBinCoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in2 f g).
    Defined.
  End IsBinaryCoproduct.

  Section BinaryCoproducts.
    Context (P : BinCoproducts C)
            (Hm : preserves_bincoproduct m).

    Definition bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob
               (x y : eilenberg_moore_cat m)
      : C
      := pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)).

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y),
bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y ⟧

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y),
bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y ⟧

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (pr11 x),
bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y ⟧
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (pr11 y),
bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y ⟧

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (pr11 x),
bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y ⟧
 exact (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 _).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ m (pr11 y),
bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y ⟧
 exact (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 _).
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
· bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y =
identity
  (functor_identity C
     (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y))

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
· bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y =
identity
  (functor_identity C
     (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y))

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· (η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· identity
    (functor_identity C
       (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y))
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· (η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· identity
    (functor_identity C
       (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y))

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· (η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)

       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· identity
    (functor_identity C
       (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y))

          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

        
C: category
m: Monad C

BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

?b

?b = BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

C: category
m: Monad C

Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y) = 
?y'

          apply (nat_trans_ax (η m)).

· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
?t2

          apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
                   _ _ _
                   (make_BinCoproduct
                      _ _ _ _ _ _
                      (Hm _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))).

m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
η m (pr11 x)
· (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

· BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
η m (pr11 x) · pr21 x = ?y'

          exact (pr12 x).
        
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
identity (functor_identity C (pr11 x))
· BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

        apply id_left.

m: Monad C

Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· (η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· identity
    (functor_identity C
       (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y))

· η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
?b

          
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
· η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y) = 
?y'

          apply (nat_trans_ax (η m)).

    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))

    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
?t2

          apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes
                   _ _ _
                   (make_BinCoproduct
                      _ _ _ _ _ _
                      (Hm _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))).

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
identity (functor_identity C (pr11 y))
· BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

        apply id_left.
    Qed.

   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =
# m (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· (# m
     (BinCoproductArrow
        (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
           (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
           (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
