              (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
              (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
              (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
              (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
        (pr21 x
         · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
        (pr21 y
         · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
μ m (pr11 x) · # m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
# m (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· # m
    (BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

        (pr21 y

P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
# m (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
# m (pr21 x) · pr21 x
· BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

m: Monad C

x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
# m (pr21 x)
· (# m (BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))

       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
# m (BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

        apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
                 _ _ _
                 (make_BinCoproduct
                    _ _ _ _ _ _
                    (Hm _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
# m (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· (μ m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))) =
# m (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· (# m
     (BinCoproductArrow
        (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
           (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
           (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
           (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
           (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
              (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
              (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
              (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
              (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
        (pr21 x
         · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
        (pr21 y
         · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

· (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =

             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

        
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
μ m (pr11 y) · pr21 y
· BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)) =
# m (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· # m
    (BinCoproductArrow
       (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
          (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
          (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
             (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
             (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
       (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
       (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
# m (BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (make_BinCoproduct C (m (pr11 x)) (m (pr11 y))
       (m (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (# m (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
       (Hm (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
          (pr11 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr121 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr221 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
          (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))
    (pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
    (pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))) =
pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

        apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes
                 _ _ _
                 (make_BinCoproduct
                    _ _ _ _ _ _
                    (Hm _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))))).
    Qed.

m: Monad C

 exact (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y).

m: Monad C

 exact (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
η m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
· bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y =
identity (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
 exact (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_unit x y).
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
μ m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob x y)
· bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y =
# m (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y)
· bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mor x y
 exact (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore_ob_mult x y).
    Defined.

 apply BinCoproductIn1.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 x · BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)) =
# m (BinCoproductIn1 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· pr21 (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y)
 abstract
          (refine (!_) ;
           apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
                    _ _ _
                    (make_BinCoproduct
                       _ _ _ _ _ _
                       (Hm _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))))).
    Defined.

x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 y · ?f =
# m ?f · pr21 (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
C ⟦ pr11 y,
pr11 (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y) ⟧
 apply BinCoproductIn2.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
pr21 y · BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)) =
# m (BinCoproductIn2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
· pr21 (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y)
 abstract
          (refine (!_) ;
           apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes
                    _ _ _
                    (make_BinCoproduct
                       _ _ _ _ _ _
                       (Hm _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))))).
    Defined.

m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
BinCoproducts (eilenberg_moore_cat m)

 exact (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y).

x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m

bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y ⟧

  (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y)
  (bincoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in1 x y)
  (bincoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in2 x y)

P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m

  (pr1 (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y))
  (pr11 (bincoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in1 x y))
  (pr11 (bincoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in2 x y))

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
isBinCoproduct C (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
  (pr1 (bincoproduct_obj_eilenberg_moore x y))
  (pr11 (bincoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in1 x y))
  (pr11 (bincoproduct_eilenberg_moore_in2 x y))
 exact (pr2 (P (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).
    Defined.

C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
x, y: eilenberg_moore_cat m
isBinCoproduct C (eilenberg_moore_pr m x)
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m y)
  (eilenberg_moore_pr m
     (bincoproducts_eilenberg_moore x y))
  (# (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_eilenberg_moore x y)))
  (# (eilenberg_moore_pr m)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_eilenberg_moore x y)))

        apply P.
    Defined.

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_bincoproduct
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

    
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
preserves_bincoproduct
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ y, p ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct (eilenberg_moore_cat m)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ y)
  (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ p)
  (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₁)
  (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂) π₂)

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ y, p ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
preserves_bincoproduct m
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ y, p ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x))
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ y))
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ p))
  (pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
           π₁))
  (pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
           π₂))

      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ y, p ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
preserves_bincoproduct m
 exact Hm.
      
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ y, p ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ x))
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ y))
  (pr1 (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂ p))
  (pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
           π₁))
  (pr11 (# (functor_to_eilenberg_moore_cat m F α p₁ p₂)
           π₂))
 
C: category
m: Monad C
P: BinCoproducts C
Hm: preserves_bincoproduct m
C': category
F: C' ⟶ C
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
α: F ∙ m ⟹ functor_identity C' ∙ F
p₁: ∏ x : C',
η m (F x) · α x =
identity (functor_identity C (F x))
p₂: ∏ x : C', # m (α x) · α x = μ m (F x) · α x
x, y, p: C'
π₁: C' ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C' ⟦ y, p ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C' x y p π₁ π₂

        exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End BinaryCoproducts.
End EilenbergMooreCategoryLimits.
